productDisplayName: ASICS Women Gel 1160 Running Grey Sports Shoes
description: Well cushioned and lightweight, the asics Gel 1160 running shoe is specially designed to suit mild pronators. Offering an extremely smooth heel to toe transition coupled with a slightly cushy feel under the ball of your foot, this makes for a great gym cross trainer as well.Upper      * Double layer meshed upper for maximum breathability      * Synthetic overlays for shoe structure and to provide ample support to the midfoot      * Perforations on overlays for enhanced ventilation      * Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and protection from blistering      * Synthetic laces for durability      * Plush padded and meshed tongue for ample ventilation and comfort      * Fabric lining for inner tongue for comfort feel      * Lightly padded sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit      * Reinforced overlay above toe guard for enhanced durability and protection to the toesMidsole      * Dual-layer foam cushioning in the heel collar for snug fit      * Durable Solyte midsole for premium lightweight cushioning from the heel to the medial midfoot, specially designed to reduce overpronation      * Coloured Solyte inserts in the midsole to offer gel comfort and cushioning, protecting the feet from impact      * Reinforced gel inserts in the transparent heel to enhance cushioning and shock absorption      * Added cushioning in the forefoot for comfortable and impact-protected ride      * ComforDry sockliner with anti-microbial properties to keep the feet safe from infection      * Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic      * Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System to attenuate shock during impact phase and allow a smooth transition to midstance      * SpEVA Midsole material to improve bounce back characteristics and decrease midsole breakdownOutsole      * Made of high quality, durable rubber      * Heel and forefoot are divided into two parts, and are connected by a Trusstic Unit      * asics High Abrasion Rubber (AHAR) placed in critical area of the outsole for      * exceptional durability      * Trusstic Unit shank doesn't touch the ground, supports the foot arch preventing misalignment and enhances torsionability and stability, preventing the leg from twisting      * Decoupled heel with four individual pods to absorb shock effectively and spread it across the shoe      * Impact Guidance System (IGS) to spread shock across the foot and aid in better      * propulsion and energy return to the legs      * Outsole reinforced on the upper forefoot with a toe guard for enhanced shoe      * durability and protection to the forefoot      * Rearfoot and DuraSponge forefoot cushioning using silicon gel to minimize shockWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
